It contains: numerous 'Enter-PSSession' connections to named hosts (e.g. base-admin, base-hunt); loops over host inventory files (srl-all.txt, srl-workstations.txt) running Invoke-Command against every host; 17 'wmic /node:<ip> shadowcopy call create volume=C:\' commands targeting the workstation/server fleet; a 'Rename-Item ...Google\Update-DISABLED ...Google\Update' plus 'Start-Service gupdate'/'gupdatem' and execution of GoogleUpdate.exe pushed to all workstations; fleet-wide 'VMwareToolboxCmd.exe ... timesync disable'; repeated 'get-winevent -LogName Security -oldest -maxevents 1'; and 'find-module -name pagefilemodder*'.
